lines.text: Pools at Disney's Port Orleans Resort – Riverside | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Port Orleans Resort – Riverside
Splash about on your way to Ol’ Man Island or relax with a far more tranquil dip in one of 5 leisure pools.

Have a good ol’ time at Ol’ Man Island, a 3.5-acre refuge with a swimmin’ hole and a fishin’ hole. Fashioned after an abandoned sawmill, this pool is accessible by 3 wooden bridges and includes a 95 foot-long rustic waterslide built into the millworks.

Nearby, a whirlpool tub, the Muddy Rivers pool bar and a kiddie pool provide entertainment for all ages. A daily pool party plus an evening campfire and movie screening (on select nights) keep the fun going all day long.

Five leisure pools—3 in Alligator Bayou and 2 in Magnolia Bend—are available throughout the Resort. Offering a more relaxing respite, these pools are perfect for Guests looking to lounge the day away.
Pool lifts and other access options are available for Guests with disabilities or limited mobility. Pool hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.

Let’s make a splash at Ol’ Man Island Pool! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.
Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Complimentary towels are provided at all pools.
